metrics.name: interventionRate
metrics.numerator: count(events where eventType=intervention and status in [completed,passed])
metrics.denominator: count(distinct runId from canonical manifests in evaluation window)

metrics.name: rollbackReliability
metrics.numerator: count(manifests where outcome=rollback and exit.classification=rollback_required and rollback completion event status=completed)

metrics.name: evidenceCompleteness
metrics.numerator: count(manifests with required artifactRefs and dual provenance hashes)
metrics.denominator: count(canonical terminal manifests in evaluation window)

metrics.name: thrashRate
metrics.numerator: count(runs with retry or repeated rollback/hold transitions within window)
metrics.denominator: count(canonical terminal manifests in evaluation window)
